name: sojourn
description: Sojourn — record what your coding agent actually did, verify its claims against real diffs, and rewind to any step.

plugins.name: sojourn
plugins.description: Streams Claude Code session activity to the local Sojourn daemon for immediate timeline capture, and teaches Claude Code to drive `soj` itself. Optional: Sojourn's transcript watcher already works with zero configuration; this plugin makes ingestion immediate rather than debounce-delayed.
